Container.Name: TorLink++
Container.Overview: TorLink++ is a Torznab-compatible torrent search and download gateway built on a fork of the original Torlink terminal torrent finder/downloader.
Container.Description: TorLink++ extends the original Torlink project by bairon with a LAN-friendly Web GUI, Radarr/Sonarr-compatible Torznab API, qBittorrent handoff, built-in downloader queue, and a real embedded browser TUI powered by xterm.js and a server-side PTY. Full credit for the original Torlink TUI, curated search experience, source integrations, and downloader foundation belongs to the original author, bairon / baairon.

Config.Name: Web UI / Torznab Port
Config.Description: Browser Web UI and Torznab API port. Use http://[IP]:[PORT:9117]/ for the Web UI and http://[IP]:[PORT:9117]/api?apikey=YOUR_KEY for Radarr/Sonarr.

Config.Name: Downloads
Config.Description: Host path where TorLink++ writes built-in downloader files. The container path must remain /downloads.

Config.Name: Torznab API Key
Config.Description: Long random API key for Radarr/Sonarr/Torznab access. You can also generate/rotate this from the trusted Web UI after install.

Config.Name: Trusted Web UI
Config.Description: Allows same-origin browser Web UI requests without manually entering the API key. Only enable on a trusted LAN.

Config.Name: Download Directory
Config.Description: Built-in downloader target inside the container. Leave as /downloads unless you also change the Downloads path mapping.

Config.Name: Torznab Empty Query
Config.Description: Fallback broad query used when Radarr/Sonarr validates Torznab without a search term.

Config.Name: qBittorrent Web UI URL
Config.Description: Optional. qBittorrent Web UI URL for manual QBT button handoff, for example http://qbittorrent:8080. Radarr/Sonarr should normally use their own download-client settings.

Config.Name: qBittorrent Username
Config.Description: Optional qBittorrent username for manual QBT button handoff.

Config.Name: qBittorrent Password
Config.Description: Optional qBittorrent password or API key for manual QBT button handoff.

Config.Name: qBittorrent Category
Config.Description: Optional qBittorrent category for manual QBT button handoff.

Config.Name: qBittorrent Save Path
Config.Description: Optional qBittorrent save path override for manual QBT button handoff. Leave blank to use qBittorrent defaults.
